scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix Frontend/Auth install && npm --prefix Frontend/Billing install && npm --prefix Frontend/Invoice install
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if($pids){ foreach($pid in $pids){ try{ Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }catch{} }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; tsx watch server.ts"
scripts.dev:auth:wait: npm run wait:backend && npm run dev:auth
scripts.dev:billing:wait: npm run wait:backend && npm run dev:billing
scripts.dev:invoice:wait: npm run wait:backend && npm run dev:invoice
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,auth,billing,invoice -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:auth:wait" "npm run dev:billing:wait" "npm run dev:invoice:wait"
